Users can view their own investments.name: Users can view their own investments
Users can view their own investments.using:
((auth.uid())::text = ( SELECT users.clerk_id
   FROM users
  WHERE (users.id = investments.user_id)))

Users can insert their own investments.name: Users can insert their own investments

Users can update their own investments.name: Users can update their own investments

Users can delete their own investments.name: Users can delete their own investments

Users can view their own preferences.name: Users can view their own preferences
Users can view their own preferences.using:
((auth.uid())::text IN ( SELECT users.clerk_id
   FROM users
  WHERE (users.id = user_preferences.user_id)))

Users can update their own preferences.name: Users can update their own preferences

Users can insert their own preferences.name: Users can insert their own preferences

transactions_frequency_check.name: transactions_frequency_check
transactions_frequency_check.value: (frequency)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['once'::character varying, 'weekly'::character varying, 'biweekly'::character varying, 'monthly'::character varying, 'yearly'::character varying])::text[])

Users can view their own transactions an.name: Users can view their own transactions and group transactions

Users can create their own transactions.name: Users can create their own transactions

Users can update their own transactions.name: Users can update their own transactions

Users can delete their own transactions.name: Users can delete their own transactions

Users can view users in their group.name: Users can view users in their group
Users can view users in their group.using:
(group_id IN ( SELECT users_1.group_id
   FROM users users_1
  WHERE (users_1.clerk_id = (auth.jwt() ->> 'sub'::text))))

Users can update their own record.name: Users can update their own record

Users can view their accounts.name: Users can view their accounts
Users can view their accounts.using:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM users u
  WHERE ((u.clerk_id = (auth.jwt() ->> 'sub'::text)) AND ((u.id = ANY (accounts.user_ids)) OR (u.group_id = accounts.group_id)))))

Users can create accounts in their group.name: Users can create accounts in their group

Users can view their own budgets.name: Users can view their own budgets
Users can view their own budgets.using:
(user_id IN ( SELECT users.id
   FROM users
  WHERE (users.clerk_id = (auth.jwt() ->> 'sub'::text))))

Users can update their own budgets.name: Users can update their own budgets

Users can create their own budgets.name: Users can create their own budgets

Users can delete their own budgets.name: Users can delete their own budgets

Categories are readable by all authentic.name: Categories are readable by all authenticated users

Group members can view their group invit.name: Group members can view their group invitations
Group members can view their group invit.using:
(group_id IN ( SELECT users.group_id
   FROM users
  WHERE (users.clerk_id = (auth.uid())::text)))

recurring_transactions_frequency_check.name: recurring_transactions_frequency_check
recurring_transactions_frequency_check.value: (frequency)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['daily'::character varying, 'weekly'::character varying, 'monthly'::character varying, 'quarterly'::character varying, 'yearly'::character varying])::text[])

Users can view their associated recurrin.name: Users can view their associated recurring transactions

Users can create recurring transactions.name: Users can create recurring transactions for themselves

Users can update their associated recurr.name: Users can update their associated recurring transactions

Users can delete their associated recurr.name: Users can delete their associated recurring transactions

check_subscription_status.name: check_subscription_status
check_subscription_status.value: (subscription_status)::text = ANY ((ARRAY['free'::character varying, 'active'::character varying, 'cancelled'::character varying, 'past_due'::character varying, 'unpaid'::character varying])::text[])

Users can view their groups.name: Users can view their groups
Users can view their groups.using:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM users u
  WHERE ((u.clerk_id = (auth.jwt() ->> 'sub'::text)) AND (u.id = ANY (groups.user_ids)))))

public.budget_analytics.name: budget_analytics
public.budget_analytics.definition: SELECT u.name AS user_name, u.email AS user_email, b.description, b.amount, b.type, jsonb_array_length(b.categories) AS category_count, b.created_at, b.updated_at FROM budgets b JOIN users u ON u.id = b.user_id

public.users_with_stats.name: users_with_stats
public.users_with_stats.definition: SELECT id, clerk_id, name, email, avatar, theme_color, budget_start_date, group_id, role, created_at, updated_at, ( SELECT count(*)::integer AS count FROM budget_periods bp WHERE bp.user_id = u.id) AS total_budget_periods, ( SELECT count(*)::integer AS count FROM budget_periods bp WHERE bp.user_id = u.id AND bp.is_active = true) AS active_budget_periods FROM users u

public.category_usage_stats.name: category_usage_stats
public.category_usage_stats.definition: WITH budget_categories AS ( SELECT jsonb_array_elements_text(budgets.categories) AS category_key FROM budgets ), transaction_categories AS ( SELECT transactions.category AS category_key FROM transactions WHERE transactions.category IS NOT NULL ) SELECT c.id, c.key, c.label, c.icon, c.color, COALESCE(budget_usage.usage_count, 0::bigint) + COALESCE(transaction_usage.usage_count, 0::bigint) AS total_usage, COALESCE(budget_usage.usage_count, 0::bigint) AS budget_usage, COALESCE(transaction_usage.usage_count, 0::bigint) AS transaction_usage FROM categories c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT budget_categories.category_key, count(*) AS usage_count FROM budget_categories GROUP BY budget_categories.category_key) budget_usage ON c.key = budget_usage.category_key LEFT JOIN ( SELECT transaction_categories.category_key, count(*) AS usage_count FROM transaction_categories GROUP BY transaction_categories.category_key) transaction_usage ON c.key = transaction_usage.category_key::text
